mapper.insert: insert into detection (device_id, timestamp, image_url, processed_image_url, latitude, longitude, altitude, detection_count, model_version, inference_time, create_time) values (#{deviceId}, #{timestamp}, #{imageUrl}, #{processedImageUrl}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{altitude}, #{detectionCount}, #{modelVersion}, #{inferenceTime}, now())

insert into detection_result (detection_id, type, confidence, bbox_x, bbox_y, bbox_width, bbox_height, track_id) values (#{detectionId}, #{type}, #{confidence}, #{bboxX}, #{bboxY}, #{bboxWidth}, #{bboxHeight}, #{trackId})
